overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a desert city street on the outskirts of Night City. The player moves along a sidewalk beside red rock formations, briefly explores the adjacent desert hillside, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic billboards, and follows a blue delivery truck.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert city sidewalk with red rock hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large red rock formation rising steeply on the left side of the street
paved pedestrian walkway with distinctive red painted curb
massive white futuristic wall structure visible in the distance marking the city boundary
tall pole with traffic signals and orange accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk in a desert city environment. Red rock formations rise on the left while a multi-lane road with sparse traffic runs on the right. Various pedestrians walk along the path, and a massive futuristic wall is visible in the distant background.

events.description: camera turns left to face the desert hillside and metal guardrail
camera turns back to face forward along the street

agents.ego_description: stops walking to look at the desert landscape and hillside, then resumes walking

entered.detail: metal barrier running along the slope of the hillside
dry bushes and sparse desert vegetation covering the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to focus on the desert hillside adjacent to the sidewalk, showing a metal guardrail running along the slope and sparse desert vegetation. After observing the landscape, the view returns to the forward direction along the street.

events.description: begins crossing the multi-lane road at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then crossing the street intersection toward the gas station area

notable_agents.action: black van driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk
heavyset man in denim vest crossing the street

entered.detail: large elevated digital screen displaying advertisements on an orange support structure
futuristic gas station building with distinctive orange accents and signage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an urban intersection with a large digital billboard and orange gas station structure visible. The camera walks along the sidewalk and then crosses the multi-lane road, navigating through moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with moving traffic and delivery truck

events.description: blue delivery truck enters frame from the left and passes by
camera tracks alongside the moving truck while walking

agents.ego_description: following and observing the blue delivery truck as it drives along the road

notable_agents.action: blue delivery truck driving along the road with driver visible through window

entered.detail: large blue box truck with white text markings on the cargo container

segments.scene_description: A large blue delivery truck enters the frame and the camera follows it as it drives along the road. The truck moves from the center to the right of the frame while the camera tracks alongside it, showing the vehicle's details and the driver inside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet desert roadside into a bustling urban intersection. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk flanked by towering red rock formations and a distant futuristic wall, with sparse traffic flowing on the adjacent road. As the camera pans left to observe a metal guardrail and sparse vegetation on the desert hillside, the view then returns forward to transition toward a more developed city center. The scene expands into a busy intersection featuring a large digital billboard and an orange gas station structure, where the camera navigates through pedestrian and vehicle traffic to cross the multi-lane road. Finally, the movement shifts to track a large blue delivery truck as it pulls into frame and drives away, with the camera following closely alongside the vehicle.
